2024-25 Saint Louis Billikens Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season Next Season

Record: 19-15 (11-7, 5th in A-10 MBB)

Coach: Josh Schertz

PS/G: 74.3 (158th of 364)

PA/G: 71.3 (152nd of 364)

SRS: 3.04 (112th of 364)

SOS: 2.04 (103rd of 364)

DRtg: 103.3 (138th of 364)
